runs.text: GET IN ON PROMOS, THE LATEST DROPS + MORE

*25% Off New Fleece App Purchases and Deliveries. Offer valid through 12/17 CAST 11:59 pm PT. Excludes 25% off your $75+ purchase promotion. Use code FLEECE25 at checkout. Cannot be combined with any other offer, any shipping promotions, employee discount, gift card purchases, Forever 21 e-Gift Cards, F21 Collection, Archive Tapestry Collection, Forever 21 Home, Pre-Owned Collection, Doorbuster/Flash Final Steal, FIT + Fitness (Yoga, Pilates, Barre, L/XL active, L/XL loungewear, plus-size activewear, plus-size loungewear, plus-size sleepwear, and select activewear). Discount applied at checkout before taxes and shipping charges. Forever 21 reserves the right to modify or cancel this promotion at any time without notice.

LIMITED TIME ONLY. EXCLUSIONS APPLY. DISCOUNT WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY APPLIED AT CHECKOUT. OFFER IS VALID ONLINE ONLY AND IN-STORE LOCATIONS. VALID FOR ONE TIME USE ONLY. NO RAIN CHECKS. NOT VALID ON PREVIOUS PURCHASES. FOREVER 21 RESERVES THE RIGHT TO MODIFY OR TERMINATE THIS OFFER AT ANY TIME WITHOUT NOTICE IF CIRCUMSTANCES BEYOND ITS CONTROL REQUIRE SUCH ACTION. VOID WHERE PROHIBITED. NO ADJUSTMENTS TO PREVIOUS PURCHASES.
